title: Youth Camp "AWAKE" Successfully Held
description: Hosted a 3-day youth camp with over 60 attendees, featuring worship nights, workshops, and small-group discipleship.

title: Outreach Feeding Program
description: Partnered with the church's mission team to serve meals and share the gospel with 3 nearby communities.

title: New Officers Installed
description: Installed the current set of officers for the new term in a special Sunday service.
